name: Teri's Tortilla Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cans stewed red ripe tomatoes (extra hot), with Rotel
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crock pot.
2. Turn on low (or auto) and leave overnight.
3. Serve hot, over some fat-free cheese and crumbled WOW chips (fat free).
4. Add a dollop of fat-free sour cream or plain yogurt if desired.
WARNING: If you use extra hot Rotel, the soup will be spicy!
